file_insights.purpose: Production Gunicorn WSGI server configuration for E-Menum Django application
critical_configurations: Preload app enabled for memory efficiency
JSON structured logging for production observability
Database connection cleanup in post_fork and worker_exit hooks

patterns_discovered.description: All tunable parameters use os.environ.get() with sensible defaults, allowing deployment flexibility without code changes
Explicit database connection closure in post_fork and worker_exit hooks to prevent connection pool exhaustion across forked worker processes
Structured JSON logging format for machine-readable access logs, enabling better log aggregation and monitoring
Worker count dynamically calculated based on CPU count using multiprocessing.cpu_count()
Max requests with jitter to gracefully rotate workers and prevent memory leak accumulation

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Database connection pooling across forked processes
gotchas_discovered.issue: Django database connections are not fork-safe; child worker processes inherit parent connections leading to connection pool corruption
gotchas_discovered.solution_implemented: post_fork() and worker_exit() hooks explicitly close all connections

gotchas_discovered.issue: Default 120s timeout may be insufficient for long-running AI content generation tasks mentioned in comments
gotchas_discovered.solution_implemented: Timeout is configurable via GUNICORN_TIMEOUT environment variable

gotchas_discovered.issue: forwarded_allow_ips defaults to '127.0.0.1' only; behind Nginx proxy may need adjustment
gotchas_discovered.solution_implemented: Made configurable via GUNICORN_FORWARDED_ALLOW_IPS environment variable with comment warning

gotchas_discovered.issue: reload = False prevents automatic code reloading but is essential for production stability
gotchas_discovered.solution_implemented: Explicitly set to False with comment noting 'development only' warning

gotchas_discovered.issue: Default worker calculation (5 workers for 2 vCPU) assumes specific hardware specs
gotchas_discovered.solution_implemented: Dynamic CPU-based calculation allows override via GUNICORN_WORKERS

approach_outcome.strategy: Created comprehensive, production-ready Gunicorn configuration with environment-driven parameters, Django-specific lifecycle hooks, and structured logging
key_decisions: Chose sync worker class as default for predictability and compatibility
Implemented JSON structured logging instead of Apache Combined log format
Preload app enabled to reduce memory footprint across workers
Included comprehensive documentation and commented-out SSL section
Made all critical parameters configurable via environment variables
approach_outcome.estimated_effort: Medium - comprehensive production configuration requiring domain knowledge of Gunicorn, Django, and deployment best practices

recommendations.recommendation: Add worker class flexibility for async workloads
recommendations.reasoning: Current default 'sync' worker class may bottleneck under high concurrency; gevent or gthread could improve throughput for I/O-heavy operations
recommendations.implementation_effort: Low - configuration already supports GUNICORN_WORKER_CLASS override

recommendations.recommendation: Implement custom logging function for error tracking integration
recommendations.reasoning: While JSON logging is structured, no integration with error tracking services (Sentry, etc.) is configured
recommendations.implementation_effort: Medium - requires error handler hooks and service credentials

recommendations.reasoning: No health check mechanism defined; useful for load balancer integration and monitoring uptime
recommendations.implementation_effort: Low - add check_config and simple endpoint path configuration

recommendations.reasoning: Current 120s worker timeout requires coordination with Nginx proxy_timeout to avoid mismatches

recommendations.recommendation: Consider gthread worker class for AI content generation workloads
recommendations.reasoning: Comments mention long-running AI requests; gthread (Python threading) may be more suitable than sync for concurrent request handling
recommendations.implementation_effort: Low - requires testing and potential thread tuning

recommendations.recommendation: Add metrics endpoint for Prometheus monitoring
recommendations.reasoning: Current logging is passive; active metrics collection would enable better observability and alerting
